geopolitics_summary: EU ETS reform deadlocked ahead of Ireland presidency; methane rule delays advancing; Strait of Hormuz tensions threaten crude/LNG routes.

themes.headline: Ireland mediates divided EU on ETS reform and decarbonization targets
themes.why_it_matters: EUA price and industrial fuel-switching depend on ETS ambition. Half of EU wants rules gutted; outcome shapes 2027–2030 carbon cost and power profitability. Direct EUA volatility driver.

themes.headline: Germany and ~13 EU states push to delay landmark methane emissions rules
themes.why_it_matters: Methane rule delay reduces compliance cost for EU gas producers and importers, lowering floor on TTF; also signals softer climate posture, reducing long-term decarbonization pressure on power. TTF downside risk.

themes.headline: Record heat wave across France, 1,000+ heat-attributable deaths, hospitals stressed
themes.why_it_matters: Extreme cooling demand spikes French power load and stresses transmission. Nuclear units at risk of thermal constraints (cooling water limits). Short-term intraday and day-ahead DA spreads vulnerable; potential for supply rationing.

themes.headline: Ship attack in Strait of Hormuz; Iran enforces alternative tanker corridors
themes.why_it_matters: Hormuz tension raises crude and Brent volatility, pressuring diesel cost and European refining margins. Higher fuel costs feed into power generation via fuel-switching (gas-to-oil arbitrage) and industrial energy budgets. Indirect TTF upside.

themes.headline: UAE exit from OPEC+ reduces cartel's crude production share and market control
themes.why_it_matters: Reduced OPEC+ cohesion typically weakens crude prices and Brent floor, easing upstream cost pressures. Lower oil → lower diesel, reduces fuel-switching attractiveness into gas-fired power. Indirect downward pressure on power via fuel arb.

watchlist: Ireland EU presidency ETS reform vote & country alignment clarity (weeks).
Methane rule formal delay motion & vote date (weeks).
French nuclear unit outages / thermal constraint alerts (ongoing, intraday).
Strait of Hormuz tanker transit & insurance premium moves (days).
